item.title: LLM 评测工具包 - 配置指南
item.summary: 主配置文件位于 configs/config.json ，包含以下几个主要部分： json { "lm studio": { // LM Studio API 配置 "base url": "http://localhost:1234/v1", "model name": "local-model", "max tokens": 2048, "temperature": 0.0, "timeout": 120, "retry attempts": 3, "retry delay": 1.0 }, "evaluation": { // 评测设置 "max concurrent": 1, "delay between requests"
